frame_analyses.description: Instructional content showing Penrose drain with suture placement marks and needle driver
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup phase, instruments visible but task not yet started

frame_analyses.description: Needle driver and grasper positioning suture through Penrose drain marks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good instrument positioning, suture appears to be placed through both marks

frame_analyses.description: Beginning knot tying sequence with suture positioned for first throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture ends properly positioned for knot formation

frame_analyses.description: Creating loops for surgeon's knot (double throw) formation
Tightening first throw with instruments pulling suture ends
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper tension application on both suture ends

frame_analyses.description: Forming second throw with hand switching from first throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switching appears to be performed correctly

frame_analyses.description: Cutting suture ends with scissors after knot completion
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate cutting technique close to knot

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed knot with cut suture ends
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears secure, drain slit appears closed

knot_assessments.notes: Double throw (surgeon's knot) properly formed as first throw
Single throw with proper hand switching from throw 1
Single throw with proper hand switching from throw 2

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well approximated after knot tightening

technique_summary: This instructional video demonstrates proper FLS Task 5 technique with good knot formation and hand switching. The suture placement shows minor deviation from marks but overall acceptable technique.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise suture placement closer to marked targets
Practice more efficient movements to reduce completion time
strengths: Proper surgeon's knot formation as first throw
Good instrument handling and knot security
